mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_comment (article_id, user_id, content, image_url, create_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.nickname, u.username FROM blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM blog_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
